seo.defaultDescription: Senior Software Engineer specializing in front-end architecture with React, Next.js and TypeScript. Experience in UI component development and accessible web applications.
seo.keywords: Senior Software Engineer, Frontend, React, Next.js, TypeScript, UI Components, Web Accessibility, Web Development

profile.name: Alejandro Tejada
profile.title: Computer Science Engineer & Full Stack Developer
profile.bio: Exploring the intersection between technology, creativity, and human stories.

about.text1: I am currently a Senior Software Engineer at PayPal (Xoom) with over six years of experience in the tech industry, developing scalable, user-focused applications with high impact. I combine a strong background in Computer Science with hands-on experience in React.js, Next.js, TypeScript, AWS, and agile methodologies like SCRUM. My work is always oriented towards performance, design, and creating meaningful (and, why not, fun) digital experiences.
about.text2: Since my early university years, I have collaborated on projects across various sectors — such as fintech and e-commerce (Pacifiko, Guatemala) — with international teams, applying principles of clean code, accessibility, and usability.
about.text3: Beyond engineering, I am passionate about science fiction literature, writing short stories, puzzles, and spending time with family. I believe technology is a contemporary form of art, capable of generating catharsis and transformation in people.

jobs.title: Senior Software Engineer
jobs.description: I’m a Senior Software Engineer on the Web Team at Xoom, a global PayPal service specializing in digital remittances. I’m part of the team responsible for the web applications ecosystem, built with React, Next.js, Tailwind, JavaScript, Node.js, and AWS, ensuring that every update improves scalability, performance, and user experience.
jobs.description2: I have led modernization initiatives and visual consistency within the stack, owning several internal applications focused on managing shared styles and components. Recently, I participated in the comprehensive update of the header, footer, and main body of Xoom.com, driving a more cohesive, accessible, and modern interface for a global audience.

jobs.title: Freelance Full Stack Engineer
jobs.description: Worked as a freelance developer on web and mobile projects, contributing to the architectural design and leading the implementation of AWS services for PopAuction, a real-time auction platform for luxury items. Oversaw the integration of AWS IVS, Cognito, and IAM, as well as authentication, security, and streaming workflows. The platform was built with Next.js, Supabase, and Stripe, designed for scalability, reliability, and a seamless user experience in a global environment.
jobs.description2: Also collaborated on Uwii, a platform focused on housing design and management, where I contributed to the development of a mobile app with React Native for project visualization and tracking, improving communication between users and potential buyers.

jobs.title: Software Engineer
jobs.description: Worked on web and mobile application development for the financial and medical sectors, using low-code tools like Mendix and Visualizer, as well as custom environments with JavaScript and React. Participated in digital banking and insurance projects, contributing to the design of accessible interfaces and efficient workflows.
jobs.description2: Collaborated with multidisciplinary teams to define features, optimize performance, and improve user experience. This experience strengthened my skills in technical communication, UX/UI, and agile methodologies, preparing me to lead in complex and demanding environments.

jobs.title: Software Developer
jobs.description: I was part of the development team at Pacifiko Guatemala, a growing e-commerce platform. I contributed to implementing features in inventory, finance, digital marketing, and user experience, working on both front-end and back-end.
jobs.description2: This experience allowed me to apply full-stack development best practices and gain a comprehensive view of the digital product lifecycle, in a dynamic environment that combined technology and business strategy.

jobs.title: Teaching Assistant
jobs.description: Served as a teaching assistant in courses including physics, statistics, mathematics, algorithms, and programming, supporting students in their learning process and understanding of logical and analytical fundamentals.
jobs.description2: During this period, I strengthened my ability to communicate technical concepts, foster curiosity, and adapt content to different levels, reinforcing my interest in teaching and training in STEM disciplines.

items.title: PopAuction
items.description: A real-time auction platform for luxury items, architected and developed from the ground up using Next.js, Supabase, Stripe, and AWS IVS. It includes advanced authentication with AWS Cognito, role management with AWS IAM, and live video streaming. The system was built to be secure, scalable, and ready for global growth.

items.title: Xoom.com Redesign
items.description: Major redesign of Xoom.com, a PayPal global remittances platform. I contributed to the modernization of the header, footer, and main layout using React, Next.js, and Tailwind. The update improved accessibility, performance, and design consistency across the entire site for millions of users worldwide.

items.title: Gloss and Glow (In Development)
items.description: A modern beauty and makeup website featuring a dynamic catalog, integrated payment system, and an elegant, responsive design. Built with a focus on performance, accessibility, and user experience.

items.title: AWS Certified Cloud Practitioner
items.description: AWS certification validating foundational knowledge of cloud computing, architecture, security, and deployment models. Complements hands-on experience working with AWS IVS, Cognito, and IAM in real-world applications.

education.degree: Bachelor’s Degree in Computer Science and Information Technologies
education.description: Comprehensive program focused on software engineering, data management, web technologies, and cybersecurity. Active member of the Software Engineering Student Association, Cybersecurity Lab, and Data Analytics Project Team. Also participated in research projects in computational science and game design.

education.degree: Master’s Degree in Business Management and Project Management
education.description: Online, case-based Master’s program focused on strategic decision-making, leadership, and end-to-end project management. Covers key areas such as finance, marketing, HR, risk analysis, and time management, culminating in a Final Master’s Project (PFM).

certifications.title: CSS Grids and Flexbox for Responsive Web Design
Visual Elements of User Interface Design
